title: Crispy Smoked Yautia Fries with Jamaican Seasoning
description: A flavorful twist on traditional fries, these smoky yautia fries are seasoned with a hint of Jamaican spice and roasted to perfection.

ingredients.name: Yautia
ingredients.notes: Peel and cut into fry shapes

instructions: Toss yautia fries with roast, smoky seasoning, and jamaican seasoning in a bowl until evenly coated
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange yautia fries in a single layer
Drizzle olive oil over yautia fries and toss to coat
Roast yautia fries in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown
Remove yautia fries from the oven and sprinkle with salt and black pepper to taste
